evidence.rule_anchor: Brief locks SVTK_FOUNDATION_v2.6.0 hash, repo ships v2.8.0
evidence.remediation: Build accepts v2.8.0 (latest active) and documents the drift in status.foundation. Adjacent CMDs (CMD_DB/BOSS/QUEST etc.) may have same expectation. LEAD reconciles canonical foundation version across CMDs OR re-issues briefs with v2.8.0 hash.
